items.title: The ubiquitin receptor StDA1 negatively regulates aurantio-obtusin biosynthesis by mediating the degradation of the StHDR1 protein in Senna tora seeds
items.author: Zongsuo Liang
items.content: Discovery of a mechanism by which the ubiquitin receptor StDA1 mediates StHDR1 degradation reveals the role of their interaction in the accumulation of aurantio-obtusin in seeds.

items.title: Abnormal glycosylation of MUC20 mediates TAM polarization and promotes immune escape in colorectal cancer
items.author: Wanli Liu
items.content: Aberrant glycosylation of MUC20, orchestrated by the ZNF30/B4GALT2 axis, reprograms tumor-associated macrophages toward an M2 phenotype to facilitate immune escape in colorectal cancer.

items.title: Characterization of the post-mating responses of Drosophila hydei, a species that lacks Sex-Peptide
items.author: Robert K. Maeda
items.content: Investigations on the post-mating responses of Drosophila hydei show significant differences from the model species Drosophila melanogaster and suggest that the selection for long sperm may be the primary force impacting male reproductive strategy.

items.title: Epigenome-wide Mendelian randomization with multi-omics validation identifies epigenetic drivers of idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis
items.author: Huiying Zhao
items.content: Integrating EWMR and multi-omics validation identifies DNA methylation at MAN2A2 as putatively causal for IPF risk, potentially by disrupting ZNF384 binding and altering gene expression in lung tissue, suggesting a novel epigenetic mechanism in IPF pathogenesis.

items.title: Accurate prediction of ecDNA in interphase cancer cells using deep neural networks
items.author: Vineet Bafna
items.content: Deep learning-based modeling of interphase DNA-FISH images enables accurate detection of extrachromosomal DNA (ecDNA) across cell lines, xenografts, and patient tissues, overcoming the traditional requirement for mitotic cells in metaphase spreads.

items.title: Glycan-based biological degraders targeting the cytokine immune axis
items.author: Schara Safarian
items.content: This study presents a systematic strategy to design Biological Degraders (BioDegs) that target extracellular proteins for lysosomal degradation via ASGPR-mediated uptake. Using IL-6 and sIL-6R models, key design factors influencing degradation efficiency were identified.

items.title: Intermittent Hypoxia Associated with Sleep Apnea Disrupts Microvascular Hemodynamics and Oxygen Delivery
items.author: Pedro Cabrales
items.content: Using hyperspectral imaging and intravital microscopy, this study reveals how cyclic hypoxia impairs microvascular perfusion and tissue oxygenation.

items.title: Orientia tsutsugamushi targets lamin A using Ank effectors and alters chromatin to inhibit NF-κB
items.author: Jason A. Carlyon
items.content: Orientia tsutsugamushi utilizes a unique, conserved domain in Ank effector proteins to bind lamin A and inhibit NF-κB, which is linked to global alterations in chromatin accessibility during infection.
